commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Session 10: implement REQUEST.pdf — order logic, reservations, inventory roles, backup email, Developers Time Log
commits.body:
Orders: in-dropdown staff search; pool type/sort filters + 10/page pagination; order channel/payment/fulfillment constraint logic (walk-in => Paid only); Next disabled without data; unsaved-changes close confirmation; Refund removed.

Pending Payment: added History of Payment (paid orders, timestamps, CSV export). Dashboard: Inventory snapshot moved to top.

Inventory: admin image upload in grid + table; green/amber/red status colors; fixed Image column misalignment; apiRequest supports FormData. Accounting: ledger 20/page pagination + date & account filters.

New INVENTORY_MANAGER role (employee subtype, inventory-only access + nav/route scoping). Settings: default light + boot-time tweak persistence + scroll fix.

Maintenance: Resend backup email (editable, password-gated) + Email-Now; full wipe re-seeds default admin; restore requires admin password + typing ACCEPT.

Reservations: handle-this-order endpoint + buttons; Reservation History with date-range CSV export. Forecasting: per-item includes ALL items (flat fallback for sparse data). Developers Time Log screen from full git history (gen-changelog at build).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Fix Railway/nixpacks build — pin Node 20 for Vite 7
commits.body:
Railway's nixpacks default was Node 18.20.5, but Vite 7.3 requires
Node >=20.19.0 (uses crypto.hash, added in Node 20). Build failed with:

    [vite:build-html] crypto.hash is not a function

Pin Node 20 three ways so every tool agrees:

- package.json `engines.node`: ">=20.19.0", `engines.npm`: ">=10.0.0"
- .nvmrc: 20.19.0 (for nvm-aware envs)
- nixpacks.toml: setup phase explicitly requests nodejs_20 + npm-10_x

Also resolves the EBADENGINE warnings for bson@7, mongodb@7, mongoose@9,
mquery@6, vite@7 that all required >=20.19.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Session 9: 141-item checklist audit consolidated in code.md
commits.body:
Walks every numbered item from the project owner's master checklist with
implementation evidence (file:line) and status. All groups marked ✅:

- Login/auth (1-5,15) — JWT + AdminRoute wrapper
- Tutorial (6-13) — animated cursor + spotlight + word-by-word, 40 steps
- Workflows (14-22) — E2E verified via API in S8
- Presence dot (23) — isOnline helper based on lastLogin <5min
- Console/server errors (24,25) — only Vite WS preview noise
- Theme readability (26,27,135) — text-foreground/bg-background everywhere
- Settings polish (28,29,49-51) — picker removed, scroll fix, Tweaks inline
- Dashboard export (30) — exportDashboardPDF
- Dead buttons (31-33) — Import CSV + Print labels wired
- Leave request, offers, orders (34-37,67-75,92,108-110) — E2E verified
- Forecasting PDF (38-40) — html2canvas + rich layout
- Reports (41,105,106) — reactive computed values + Top Customers
- Dashboard green radios (42,43) — animate-ping bg-green-400/500
- Realtime (44-46,115-118,127,132) — 32 emitEvents + 1s polling
- Tarlac→Antipolo (47) — zero remaining matches in src/docs
- Scroll caps (48,138) — appropriate pb-* on every page
- Calculator (52-54,63-66) — fixed bottom-right, keyboard, per-user
- Per-user settings (53,55) — localStorage namespaced by username
- Assign button (61,62) — SaaS pill + avatar dropdown
- Analytics (77-90) — dashboard.advanced fully populated
- Total Stocks rename (91) — confirmed
- Reservations/Billing/Pending (93-97) — reactive
- Accounting (98-104) — balanced totals, live ledger balances
- Help (112-114) — 60+ FAQs + chat
- Forms (129) — 22 pages use zodResolver
- Role permissions (128) — adminOnly + AdminRoute
- Exports (133,134,139) — jsPDF/autotable/html2canvas all wired
- Employee/admin parity (137) — verified
- Badges (125,126) — count<=0 hides

Honest outstanding gaps listed at bottom: order-detail UI click-through
wasn't done in this session (API path verified); #41 text-styling note
was incomplete; #69-75 orders processed via API not UI dialog.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Add Chart of Accounts table with admin-delete for empty accounts
commits.body:
Surfaces the chart of accounts directly in the Accounting page (was previously
only accessible via the entry-form autocomplete datalist). Each row shows the
live balance derived from the ledger, and admins get a Delete button that's
enabled only when the account has zero balance (the backend already enforces
"no delete if has ledger history"). This is what the user asked for in
"REMOVE THE ACCOUNTS IN THE ACCOUNTING / IN THE Chart of Accounts, REMOVE WHAT
IS NOT NEEEDED THERE".

- New deleteAccountMutation wired to DELETE /api/accounting/accounts/:id
- New table card between Financial Position cards and General Ledger
- Disabled-state shows tooltip explaining why an account can't be deleted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Wire Inventory Import CSV + Print labels — no more dead buttons
commits.body:
- Import CSV: hidden file input + CSV parser that POSTs each row to /api/items.
  Expected header: itemName,category,supplierName,unitPrice,currentQuantity.
  Toasts the success/skip count when done.
- Print labels: triggers window.print() so the current inventory view becomes
  a print-friendly page (browser-native, respects current filters & view mode).

Closes the last 2 dead buttons identified during the S8-7 tab walk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Fix release flow + accounting balances reactivity
commits.body:
- Release endpoint now sets fulfillmentStatus="completed" + completedProcessingAt and emits DASHBOARD_STATS_UPDATED. Previously only currentStatus was set, so Reports "Completed" counter stayed at 0 and dashboard fulfillment metrics were stuck. Verified end-to-end: 6 orders processed → completedOrders=6, todayRevenue=3135
- /api/accounting/accounts now derives balance live from GeneralLedgerEntry totals, so the Chart of Accounts panel never shows stale zeros. Uses debit-credit for Asset/Expense, credit-debit for Liability/Equity/Revenue
- Added DELETE /api/accounting/accounts/:id (admin, blocks delete if ledger history exists)
- Accounting page Total Debits/Credits/Net Balance now use the full-ledger summary instead of the paginated table (which only had 20 entries)
- accountTypeMap expanded to cover Cash on Hand, Cash, GCash, Delivery/Salaries/Utilities Expense, Service Revenue so Asset/Liability/Revenue/Expense rollups capture every common ledger account name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  so the floating overlay no longer needs to exist

- Help module: +11 advanced FAQs covering Forecasting PDF, Tweaks-vs-Settings, calculator

  interaction, pending-badge logic, messaging flow, and dashboard export contents

  works in production builds

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Session 6: pool/unassign fix, TTS voice lock, ARIMA(1,1,1) forecasting
commits.body:
Order pool bugs:
- server/routes.ts POST /api/orders/:id/assign with empty username now resets
  fulfillmentStatus to "pending" and clears startedAt/completedProcessingAt.
  Without this, orders that had already entered "processing" or "ready" stayed
  invisible to the pool query when admin unassigned via POST.
- client/src/pages/orders.tsx adds inline "Return to pool" button per row
  in the Admin Assigned-Orders table (visible unless completed/cancelled).
- create/assign/unassign mutations switch from invalidateQueries to
  refetchQueries({type:"active"}) so the pool table updates immediately
  instead of waiting for the 1-second global polling tick.

TTS voice lock:
- server/routes.ts /api/tts now ignores Settings.ttsVoice and always uses
  "en-US-GuyNeural" (per project owner directive — single voice site-wide).
- server/models/Settings.ts default updated to en-US-GuyNeural.
- client/src/pages/settings.tsx removes the voice picker Select; static
  read-only card shows the locked voice. TTS_VOICES constant deleted.

ARIMA forecasting (NEW module):
- server/lib/arima.ts — pure-TypeScript ARIMA(1, 1, 1) implementation
  (~180 lines, no external library). Estimates φ via lag-1 autocorrelation
  of differenced series, θ via lag-1 autocorrelation of residuals, σ via
  residual stddev. Forecasts walk forward with √h-scaled 95% prediction
  intervals. bucketByDay() helper turns timestamped events into daily series.
- server/routes.ts new endpoints:
  - GET /api/forecast/items?horizon=14&lookback=60 — per-item demand forecast
    + reorder urgency (critical/high/medium/low based on daysOfStock)
  - GET /api/forecast/aggregate?horizon=14&lookback=60 — orders/day and
    revenue/day forecasts with shared chart labels
- client/src/pages/forecasting.tsx — NEW polished UI:
  - Header with ARIMA(1, 1, 1) badge + horizon toggle (7/14/30)
  - KPI strip: forecast orders, forecast revenue, items at risk, items healthy
  - Aggregate tab: two ComposedCharts (orders + revenue) with confidence
    bands, solid actual line + dashed forecast line, vertical "Today"
    ReferenceLine, model parameter footer
  - Per-item tab: search, urgency filter chips, expandable rows with mini
    sparkline + 7-stat detail panel
  - Explanation card describing what ARIMA(1, 1, 1) means + how to read
    the confidence band
- Routing + nav: /forecasting added to App.tsx; sidebar nav item with
  TrendingUp icon between Reports and admin section.

Smoke test (live dev server) confirmed:
  - /api/forecast/aggregate → 200, 61 days history + 14 days forecast,
    fitted params (φ=-0.37, θ=-0.04, intercept=0.11)
  - /api/forecast/items → 200, 11 items analyzed
  - Unassign POST {username:""} → assignedTo="", fulfillment="pending",
    confirmed back-in-pool

marl.md + code.md updated:
- ARIMA moved from "deferred to future work" to "implemented and shipped"
- New §5.6.A in marl.md documents the parameter estimation math + tells
  the writers exactly where to put it in Chapters 2 + 3
- code.md gets Section 27 covering every file touched in this session

Build: 0 TypeScript errors, clean npm run build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.subject: Add marl.md — comprehensive guide for updating Chapters 1-3 to match shipped system
commits.body:
Documents every change needed to align the manuscript with the actual 24-module
implementation:
- Module catalog grew from 13 → 24 (11 new modules + 13 existing)
- 12 new procedural flowcharts to draw
- 7 new DFDs to draw
- 10 new ERD entities with attributes + relationships
- 8 new IPO sheets, 8 new HIPO charts
- ~15 new screen design figures
- Updated Statement of the Problem (+3), Objectives (+4), Scope, Delimitations
- Updated Software Process Model, System Architecture, Feasibility, Testing, Evaluation
- Replaces "Hash + Trie + ARIMA + FIFO" algorithm list with the honest implementation
- Adds Table 8 (module integration test results)
- Editing checklist + defense slide bullets at the end

Total: ~440 lines, organized as 11 sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Session 5: animated boot loader, JOAP logo, Replit cleanup, README
commits.body:
Boot loader (client/index.html):
- Inline the animated hammer-guy loader (from loader.html) so it paints before
  any JS bundle downloads
- Hammer guy walks letter-to-letter (J→O→A→P), hammers each, sparks fly
- All keyframes inlined under <style>; no external CSS deps
- Inline <script> waits for BOTH conditions before fading out:
  • MIN_DURATION 5000ms (one full cycle, lets every letter finish)
  • React mount detected via MutationObserver on #root
- MAX_DURATION 12000ms safety bail-out
- prefers-reduced-motion disables animations entirely
- New <meta theme-color>, <meta description>, <title>JOAP Hardware Trading</title>
- Favicon switched to new SVG (PNG kept as fallback)

Logo (client/public/favicon.svg + client/src/components/joap-logo.tsx):
- New vector mark: crossed hammer + screwdriver on amber gradient rounded square
- Spark at the crossing point
- Reusable <JoapLogo size={…}/> React component with unique gradient IDs
- Wired into sidebar (32px), login desktop (44px), login mobile (40px), about hero (80px)
- Removed all <Hammer/> icon usages in brand contexts

Replit teardown:
- Deleted .replit, replit.md, replit.nix
- Removed @replit/vite-plugin-cartographer, @replit/vite-plugin-dev-banner,
  @replit/vite-plugin-runtime-error-modal from package.json
- vite.config.ts: stripped Replit plugin imports + conditional loading
- HMR clientPort 443 → 5000 (was for Replit's reverse proxy)

.gitignore:
- attached_assets/ (local-only image drops)
- uploads/, backups/ (runtime data)
- .env*, *.pem (secrets)
- .replit, replit.md, replit.nix, .local/, .config/ (Replit + local state)
- .vscode/, .idea/, *.swp, Thumbs.db (editor/OS)
- *.pdf, loader.html, .claude/launch.json

README.md:
- Centered hero with badges, full feature list, quick-start, scripts table,
  project layout tree, architecture notes, conventions, tech stack table,
  browser support, contributing checklist, developer credits
- Replaces the previous minimal placeholder

Smoke test:
- Verified full order workflow end-to-end against running dev server:
  login → fetch items → create order → assign → start → mark done
- Every backend route returns valid JSON, respects auth, updates DB state
- Documented in code.md Section 26

Build: 0 TypeScript errors · clean npm run build (dist/public + dist/index.cjs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Session 5: audit + stability — ErrorBoundary, tutorial overhaul with lightning focus, EmptyState polish
commits.body:
Audit:
- Logged into the running dev server as admin
- Visited every one of the 18 nav routes: Dashboard, Inventory, Orders, Reservations, Billing, Pending Payment, Accounting, Reports, Offers, Requests, Employees, Users, Settings, Maintenance, System Logs, Profile, Help, About
- Verified each renders with the correct H1, contains its expected interactive elements, and produces zero failed network requests
- Confirmed Create Order, Edit Item (inventory ...), Create User dialogs all open correctly

Stability:
- New ErrorBoundary class component (client/src/components/error-boundary.tsx)
- Wraps the App at the very top AND wraps <Router /> inside the layout, so a single page crash never blanks the whole shell — user gets a clean recovery card with Try Again and Go Home buttons
- Detailed error pre block is collapsed by default but available for debugging
- Logs the componentStack to console

Tutorial overhaul (cursor + "lightning" focus follows the flow):
- Replaced the obsolete Global Search step (testid was removed earlier) with a
  Breadcrumbs + Live PHT clock step in both admin and employee tracks
- Added 6 new admin steps: Pending Payment dashboard, Employee Requests inbox,
  Employee Directory, Daily Sales Goal in Settings, Floating Calculator,
  UI Tweaks Panel — each with a 1-2 sentence narration tailored to the feature
- Added 4 new employee steps: Pending Payment, My Profile, Floating Calculator,
  UI Tweaks
- Replaced the single primary border ring with a 3-layer "lightning lock-on":
  outer pulsing radial halo (radial-gradient, animates scale + opacity),
  mid expanding glow ring (border + boxShadow, animates scale via
  tutorialRingExpand keyframes), crisp inner focus ring with inset + outer
  glow shadow. Inline <style> with keyframes ships with the component so no
  global CSS edits needed.
- Cursor SVG now uses a white→primary gradient fill plus drop-shadow filter
  so it glows; trailing ping + pulse ripple layers make movement feel alive

SaaS polish:
- New EmptyState component (client/src/components/empty-state.tsx) with
  4 tones (neutral, primary, success, warning) — icon in a tinted square,
  title, description, optional action
- Wired into Requests page ("Inbox zero" with success tone when no pending
  requests) and Pending Payment ("All caught up!" with success tone when no
  pending payment orders)

Build: 0 TypeScript errors · clean Vite + esbuild build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: hanmajohn3
commits.subject: Add comprehensive payment processing and real-time updates to orders
commits.body:
Implements a detailed payment modal for order fulfillment, including cash and GCash options, receipt uploads, and transaction code generation. Enhances real-time data synchronization across the application using socket events for various actions like payment logging, order release, and ledger updates. Adds a public API endpoint for fetching live dashboard statistics to the login page and refactors existing API endpoints related to payment processing and data validation. Updates database schemas and validation rules to accommodate new payment details and transaction codes.

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Session 4: UX polish — header cleanup, inventory edit, daily sales goal, peak hours export, user log target picker, SaaS-style employee modal
commits.body:
Header (App.tsx):
- Remove global search input + ⌘K kbd hint (search is contextual per page)
- Remove notification bell icon (badges on sidebar nav items cover the use case)
- Strip the 135-line unused GlobalSearch function and dependent imports
- Header is now: SidebarTrigger → Breadcrumbs → spacer → LiveClock → username pill → Logout

LiveClock:
- Switch to 12-hour PH format (hour12: true, hour: "numeric") — e.g. "7:09:42 PM PHT"

Inventory (inventory.tsx):
- Wire the "…" row button to open a new Edit dialog
- Add editPrice/editQty/editCategory/editSupplier state + editMutation (PATCH /api/items/:id)
- Add deleteItemMutation (DELETE /api/items/:id) inside the same dialog with confirm
- New data-testids: input-edit-category, input-edit-supplier, input-edit-price,
  input-edit-qty, button-save-item, button-delete-item, button-edit-item-<id>

Daily sales goal (system-wide, admin-configurable):
- Settings model: new dailySalesGoal field (default 100000 PHP)
- shared/schema.ts: synced ISettings + Zod settingsSchema
- Settings page: new FormField in System Settings card (admin only) with
  description explaining it's reflected on every dashboard
- Dashboard: queries /api/settings, derives DAILY_GOAL from settings,
  falls back to 100000 if not loaded yet. Ring gauge + Achieved/Target/Remaining
  all read from this single source of truth.

Peak Hours export (dashboard.tsx):
- Wire the previously-stub Export button to exportPeakHoursPDF(grid)
- Lazy-import jspdf; render landscape A4 with title, timestamp, 7×24 cell grid
  colored along the amber HSL ramp, hour labels every 3h, day labels Mon-Sun,
  5-step Low→High legend
- Includes hslToRgb helper for jspdf's RGB setFillColor

System Logs → User Log tab (system-logs.tsx):
- Add target user Select (sources from /api/users/simple), defaults to none
- Filter CalendarUserLog by `l.actor === targetUser`
- Day-detail card heading now reads "<target>'s activity · <day>"
- Remove the right-hand "Recent Activity" 50-item list entirely
- Empty-state message when no target is selected

Employee Profile modal (employees.tsx):
- Replace plain DialogHeader with a gradient hero (135° amber gradient + radial
  white overlays at 10% opacity)
- Identity block: 96×96 photo with ring-4 ring-white + shadow, online dot,
  three pill chips (employee ID mono, role solid white, status solid emerald/gray)
- Action row uses variant=secondary with shadows (Camera/Upload, Replace/Remove,
  Message, Export)
- Account info strip: bg-muted/30 rounded rectangle with 2-col grid (Email,
  Phone, Created, Last login), primary-colored icons
- New KpiTile helper component: 4 colored tiles (emerald/blue/amber/rose) with
  icon badge top-right and font-mono tabular-nums big numbers
- Productivity bar chart: custom <linearGradient> amber bars, rounded tops,
  subtle dashed grid, hidden vertical lines, custom tooltip
- All existing data-testids preserved

code.md: added Section 23 (~200 lines) documenting every session 4 file change
in full sentences with rationale, code excerpts, and a verification checklist.

Build: 0 TypeScript errors · clean npm run build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Fix dev server boot on Windows + offers query undefined bug
commits.body:
- server/index.ts: 'reusePort: true' is a Linux-only socket option that throws
  ENOTSUP on Windows. Wrap it in `if (!isWindows)` so the dev server actually
  starts via `npm run dev` on Windows machines.

- client/src/pages/offers.tsx: the queryFn returned `json.data` directly which
  could be undefined (TanStack Query throws on undefined query results). Now
  falls back to `{ offers: [], total: 0 }`.

Verified manually by logging in as admin and visiting every nav route:
Dashboard, Inventory, Orders, Reservations, Billing, Accounting, Reports,
Pending Payment, Offers, Requests, Employees, Users, Settings, Maintenance,
System Logs, Profile, Help, About — all render with their proper titles and
key UI elements (Create Order dialog opens at "Step 1 of 5 — Customer & Type",
sidebar badges show counts, header has breadcrumbs + ⌘K search + live PHT
clock + Tweaks panel button + user pill + logout, floating calculator bubble
present).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Adopt joap-main UI as definitive design: dashboard, inventory, charts, heatmap, KPI cards, page-header
commits.body:
Replace front-end pages and components with the joap-main prototype implementation that matches
the screenshots (slate+amber theme, KPI strip, sparklines, daily sales goal ring, shift summary,
top items/customers, activity feed, payment mix donut, peak hours heatmap, refined inventory
table with category pills, sticky-bar header with breadcrumbs/⌘K/live PHT clock/Tweaks panel).

New components (added):
- client/src/components/charts.tsx — Sparkline, RingGauge, PaymentMixDonut, ActivityRow widgets
- client/src/components/heatmap.tsx — Peak-hours heatmap (7 days × 24 hours)
- client/src/components/kpi-card.tsx — KPI tile with sparkline + delta chip
- client/src/components/page-header.tsx — Common page heading + actions slot

Pages overhauled (kept backends/auth/sockets/real-time polling intact):
- dashboard.tsx — full prototype layout with KPI strip, revenue trend, daily goal, shift
  summary, top items/customers, activity feed, payment mix, peak hours heatmap
- inventory.tsx — category pill filter, table/grid toggle, KPI strip
- orders.tsx, reservations.tsx, billing.tsx, pending-payment.tsx, settings.tsx, login.tsx,
  about.tsx, users.tsx, system-logs.tsx — restyled per prototype, all data-testids preserved

Sidebar (app-sidebar.tsx) — three sections (OPERATIONS, ADMIN, SYSTEM), badge counts wired
to real queries, footer user card with initials + shift label, brand block matches screenshots.

Header (App.tsx) — breadcrumbs + global search w/ ⌘K + live PHT clock + Tweaks panel + user
pill, sticky with backdrop blur. Esc closes search.

Legacy preserved: dashboard-legacy.tsx, inventory-legacy.tsx kept as reference.

Fixes applied during merge:
- inventory.tsx form defaults: removed reorderLevel (not in createItemSchema), swapped to
  safetyStock field; cast avgDailyUsage access on IItem
- dashboard.tsx: Array.from() around Map iterators (tsconfig target ES2015 compat)

Cleanup: removed joap-main/ and joap-donot-delete/ scratch folders from project root.

Backends, server routes, Mongoose models, Socket.io, JWT auth, real-time polling,
TTS pipeline, Tutorial, Floating Calculator, Gemini chat — all unchanged.

Build: ✅ 0 TypeScript errors · ✅ npm run build clean (dist/index.cjs 1.2mb).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: UI overhaul: adopt modern slate+amber theme, Manrope font, breadcrumbs, live clock, Tweaks panel, ⌘K shortcut
commits.body:
- Replace client/src/index.css with new theme tokens from claude-design-work (slate neutrals + amber primary; Manrope UI + JetBrains Mono numerics)
- Add Manrope to client/index.html Google Fonts
- App.tsx header: 3-zone layout (sidebar+breadcrumbs+search | clock+tweaks+user pill+logout), Cmd/Ctrl+K focuses search, ⌘K hint kbd shown
- New components: Breadcrumbs (route-derived trail), LiveClock (PHT every second), TweaksPanel (dark mode / accent / density / font / card style with localStorage persistence)
- Sidebar brand block: amber tile + "JOAP Hardware · Trading · Tarlac"

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: update project

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Massive feature update: About overhaul, orders admin view, calculator, pending payment nav, system logs calendar, users deactivation, reservations delete, offers duplicate check, settings fixes
commits.body:
- About page: new UI with 3 developers (Cabilao, Ebona, Mirasol), tech stack grid, features list
- Orders (admin): remove View by Staff Member, add Assigned Orders section grouped by employee with search/filter, pool search-only
- Orders (employee): Create Order button added, duplicate order detection with See Order alert
- Socket notifications: invalidate all order query variants, TTS respects per-user localStorage flag
- Settings: color theme, font, font size all apply correctly; store details admin-only; TTS/calc toggles per user
- Floating calculator: draggable Casio-style with memory, listens to joap-calc-toggle event
- Sidebar: Pending Payment nav with badge count for all users; Settings link for employees; removed gcash tab from billing
- Pending Payment page: new /pending-payment route showing only pending_payment orders
- System logs: split into All Logs + User Log tabs; User Log has calendar view with login/logout per day, paginated events
- Users: deactivated accounts section below active users; reactivate with admin password confirmation dialog
- Reservations: delete cancelled reservations with admin password confirmation; server DELETE route added
- Offers: duplicate name check on create (returns 409 if active offer with same name exists)
- Server: verify-password endpoint, remove reorderThreshold/lowStockThreshold from settings
- itemupload.json template created in root

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Rename readme.md to replit.md

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Rename replit.md to readme.md

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Add Order Assignment System with TTS, task-lock, and 3-step processing lifecycle
commits.body:
- New Order fields: startedAt, completedProcessingAt (processing lifecycle timestamps)
- New API routes: POST claim, POST start-processing, POST complete-processing, DELETE assign, GET my-active
- Task-lock: employees can only hold one active (non-completedProcessing) order at a time
- GET /api/orders?pool=true: FIFO unassigned pending orders for the claim pool
- TTS scripts: buildAssignmentTTSScript (reassign / self-claim / normal), buildUnassignmentTTSScript
- Global Socket.io hook (use-socket-notifications.ts) mounted in AuthenticatedLayout
- orders.tsx: employee view gets Start/Done buttons on assigned cards + Claim button on pool; admin view gets Pending Pool section with Assign dropdown
- order-detail.tsx: Assignment card shows 3-step lifecycle tracker, Start/Mark-Done for assignee, Reassign/Unassign for admins
- code.md updated exhaustively with every new file, route, mutation, and UI change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.author: JOHN MARWIN EBONA
commits.subject: Fix boot errors, add accounting PDF export with charts, harden MongoDB connection
commits.body:
- Add server_mongo.ts: hardcoded Atlas URI, idempotent connectMongo(), env-var override
- Refactor server/db.ts: thin shim over server_mongo.ts, no-env boot works cleanly
- Fix auth.ts TS2802: use Array.from() for MapIterator in clearAllSessionsForUser & GC loop
- Fix script/build.ts: remove corrupted garbage lines 52-60, build now succeeds cleanly
- Overhaul accounting.tsx: PDF export (bar chart, pie/legend, ledger table, KPI row, footers),
  in-page Recharts bar + donut charts, financial position cards, ledger totals footer,
  account-name autocomplete datalist, coloured KPI cards with icons
- Update code.md: document all changes with full detail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
